blended.narrative: Mont-Tremblant is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,514 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
